mapper.select: SELECT cm.USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, cm.ENRL_STAT_CD, cm.REG_DT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON cm.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY cm.REG_DT ASC

SELECT cm.USER_ID, CASE WHEN NVL(lect.TOTAL_LECTURES, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(prog.COMPLETED, 0) * 100.0 / lect.TOTAL_LECTURES, 0) END AS PROGRESS_RATE FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_LECTURES FROM LECTURE l JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cl.COURSE_SN = l.COURSE_SN WHERE cl.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND l.OPNN_YN = 'Y' ) lect LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS COMPLETED FROM STUDENT_CONTENT_PROGRESS WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND CMPL_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY USER_ID ) prog ON cm.USER_ID = prog.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn}

SELECT cm.USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn}) AS TOT_ASGMT_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT s.SBMT_SN) AS SBMT_ASGMT_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.GRDD_YN = 'Y' THEN s.SBMT_SN END) AS GRDD_ASGMT_CNT, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.GRDD_YN = 'Y' THEN s.SCORE END), 2) AS AVG_SCORE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXAM_TAKER et JOIN EXAM e ON e.EXAM_SN = et.EXAM_SN WHERE et.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND e.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND e.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99') AS EXAM_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s ON s.SBMT_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND s.ASGMT_SN IN (SELECT ASGMT_SN FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn}) WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY cm.USER_ID, m.USER_NAME ORDER BY m.USER_NAME ASC

SELECT cl.CLASS_SN AS classSn, cl.CLASS_NM AS classNm, c.COURSE_NM AS courseNm, cl.CLASS_STAT_CD AS classStatCd FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cm.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE c ON cl.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN WHERE cm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ORDER BY cm.REG_DT DESC
